message:
feat(tui): wire TransparencyWidget into metrics screen with drill-down + cache section (br-272c2, H.2)

Add Enter/Escape/1-4 keyboard shortcuts for disclosure level navigation.
Enter activates drill-down showing selected evidence entry at Detail level.
Escape steps back through levels and deactivates drill-down at Badge.
Cache eviction entries filtered and rendered in dedicated dashboard section.
6 transparency tests passing (2 new: cache_screen_integration, drill_down_from_ledger).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
